title: Enphase Energy Q1 2024 Earnings: Strong Revenue Growth
text: Enphase Energy reported Q1 2024 revenue of $263.3 million with 46.2% non-GAAP gross margin and shipped 1,382,195 microinverters (603.6 megawatts DC) and 75.5 megawatt hours of IQ Batteries. Q1 2024 delivered 46% gross margin, 31% operating expenses and 15% operating income as percentage of revenue on non-GAAP basis including IRA benefit. For Q2 2024, guidance set revenue range $290-330 million with expected 100-120 megawatt hours IQ Battery shipments. Results showed company recovery from prior period challenges with sequential growth.
